case_title: PO ZHAO VS. YUI FUNG TANG

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $30.00) SERVED DEC-03-2010, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT TANG, YUI FUNG

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-03-2011 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-03-2011 BY PAUL SLAVIT. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT. PAUL CHOW INTERPRETS ENGLISH/CANTONESE - CANTONESE/ENGLISH ON PLAINTIFF'S BEHALF. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-03-2011 - JUDGMENT.
PROOF OF SERVICE OF CLAIM FILED BY PLAINTIFF ZHAO, PO SERVED DEC-03-2010, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT TANG, YUI FUNG
PROOF OF SERVICE OF CLAIM FILED BY PLAINTIFF ZHAO, PO SERVED DEC-03-2010, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT TANG, YUI FUNG
EXHIBITS RETURNED TO DEFENDANT TANG, YUI FUNG ADDITIONAL PLAINTIFF EXHIBITS
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY ZHAO, PO AS TO DEFENDANT TANG, YUI FUNG ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-03-2011 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ZHAO, PO IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT TANG, YUI FUNG THE JUDGMENT REPRESENTS A DECISION ON THE SOLE ISSUE OF PLAINTIFF'S ENTITLEMENT TO RELOCATION BENEFITS PURSUANT TO THE SAN FRANCISCO RENT ORDINANCE, AND IS WITHOUT PREJUDICE TO ANY OTHER CLAIM FOR BREACH OF CONTRACT, MISREPRESENTATION, OR OTHER ISSUES. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED JUL-01-2011 ORDERED DESTROYED
